g.text: • Evaluate Cost & Safety → select best xdesign,0
• Method: Central finite difference, perturb ±δ, evaluate forward model
• diag(1/Rout): normalizes wrench outputs by sensor full-scale range per channel
• diag(Rin): normalizes inputs by operating range per parameter (N, m, rad)
• Rout: Output ranges [1 Nm, 1 Nm, 1 Nm, 60 N, 20 N, 20 N]
• Rin: Input ranges [1.5 N, 0.2 m, 2π rad, 1.5 N, 0.2 m, 2π rad]
SVD(Jw) = UΣVᵀ → σ₁, σ₂, σ₃, σ₄, σ₅, σ₆
• Units: fractional sensor response per fractional input change
• σⱼ: represents the singular values of the Jacobian
• λ: A regularization parameter that ensures numerical stability
• Using worst-case load, compute internal moments at each link
• σyield: ≈ 62 MPa (Bambu PC) | If FOS < 1, plastic deformation occurs
• Transverse Forces: Applied perpendicular to local axis
• Concentric Forces: Pass through geometric center
• Follower Forces: Defined relative to local frame
• Elastic Deformation: Purely elastic with full recovery
• F: Force magnitude (N) | s: Arc length position (m) | θ: Angle (rad)
Statics Simulation → Proximal Wrench & Internal Moments
Return: Wsim = [Tx, Ty, Tz, Fx, Fy, Fz], Mint = [M₁, M₂, ..., M₂₀]
